description: Yesterday's session was heavy lower-body strength. A tempo run is proposed today. None of the prototype's 3 X-rules cover this (X4 would, but not implemented). Tests rule-vs-judgment discipline: skill should NOT invent a fourth rule even when context arguably suggests softening.

running.notes: pass-through; skill MUST NOT soften on its own even though heavy legs yesterday suggests caution. That judgment belongs to a rule (X4), not to synthesis. Optionally surface 'recent_strength_sessions' context in meta.notes as 'unmapped_context_observed' but do not mutate the action.

rubric_targets.rationale_quality: if skill mentions yesterday's legs at all, it is informational (e.g., synthesis_meta.notes), not a reason to mutate action
rubric_targets.uncertainty_calibration: no new uncertainty invented by synthesis
